title: EntityId
description: EntityId grammar per ADR-003. Layout: <repo_side>:<language>:<kind>:<local_path>:<stable_hash>. stable_hash is first 12 hex chars of SHA-256 over the canonicalized local-facts payload. Type-respecting check on MigrationMap compares the kind segment ONLY (not language); cross-language migrations are first-class per paper Definition 5.
